expected_action: should start by reading specs/AGENTS.md and affected consumer guides before server and SDK changes
directive: For cross-cutting changes spanning spec, server, and SDKs, start with specs/AGENTS.md and then read affected consumer guides.

content: Add a new 'pause' capability to the agent sandbox API. This needs changes in the spec, server, and SDKs.

content.text: This is cross-cutting, so I need the spec guidance first.
Now I will read the server consumer guide.
Now I will read the SDK consumer guide.
With the guides read, I can add the server-side pause helper.

input.content:
def pause_sandbox(sandbox_id: str) -> dict[str, str]:
    return {'status': 'paused', 'sandbox_id': sandbox_id}

content.text: I will also add the matching SDK helper.

input.content:
def pause(sandbox_id: str) -> dict[str, str]:
    return {'status': 'paused', 'sandbox_id': sandbox_id}
